ERPrerequisiteComponent.Id: Product: Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations (10.0.21)
Product: Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations (10.0.22)
Product: Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations (10.0.23)
Product: Microsoft Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations (10.0.24)

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: ActionId="NO VAT Upload VAT return submission"

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Upload VAT return submission

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: ActionId="NO VAT Complete VAT return submission"

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Complete VAT return submission

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: ActionId="NO VAT Send feedback status request"

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Send feedback status request

ERFormatComponentPropertyBinding.ExpressionAsString: ActionId = "NO VAT Generate request for instance"

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Generate request for instance

ERExpressionBooleanHost.ExpressionAsString: IF(OR(ActionId="NO VAT Generate request for instance", ActionId="NO VAT Upload VAT return submission", ActionId="NO VAT Upload VAT return", ActionId="NO VAT Complete data filling", ActionId="NO VAT Complete VAT return submission", ActionId="NO VAT Send feedback status request", ActionId="NO VAT Send feedback request", ActionId="NO VAT Download payment information", ActionId="NO VAT Download validation result", ActionId="NO VAT Download receipt"), true, false)

ERExpressionStringConstant.Value: NO VAT Generate request for instance
NO VAT Upload VAT return submission
NO VAT Complete VAT return submission
NO VAT Send feedback status request

ERExpressionStringHost.ExpressionAsString: CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PaymentInformation', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_ValidationResult', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_Receipt', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_DataGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_PartyID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
CONCATENATE("Electronic message additional field ", CHAR(34), EMAdditionalFieldNames.'$FieldName_InstanceGUID', CHAR(34), " is not found.")
